prompt: Generate a fitness tracker app UI mockup. Use Image 1 for the dashboard banner, Image 2 for the daily steps widget, and Image 3 for heart rate tracking.
prompt_refined: Generate a modern fitness tracker app UI dashboard. At the top, create a prominent banner incorporating the running silhouette style from image 1. Below this banner, display a daily steps widget on the left, visually consistent with the circular design, progress bar, running icon, and step count presentation seen in image 2. On the right, include a heart rate tracking widget, designed in the style of image 3, featuring its circular display, heart icon, BPM value, and ECG line.
objects: Modern fitness tracker app UI dashboard
Running silhouette (in banner, style from image 1)
Daily steps widget on the left
Running icon (in steps widget, from image 2)
Step count (in steps widget, from image 2)
Heart rate tracking widget on the right
Heart icon, BPM value, and ECG line (in heart rate widget, from image 3)
